microsoft_ft: Owned the **plan of record** for Azure's recovery validation program, connecting 8+ cross-functional workstreams and standardizing execution workflows to sustain **45+ annual resilience drills** with $14M+ business impact.
Led 0→1 delivery of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements and driving change management across partner teams to reduce operational toil by **30%**.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, managing the full program lifecycle from strategy through launch in **4 months** — achieving a 94% recovery rate and surfacing critical hardware defects.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as center-point bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract across internal and external partners.

Managed leadership and partner communications across Engineering, Operations, and Commercial stakeholders, ensuring alignment and clarity on evolving priorities, risks, and **mitigation plans** throughout each program cycle.

Scaled team capacity through AI-driven automation, deploying an internal AI agent that restructured planning workflows and reduced cycle time by **39%**, increasing drill throughput by 21% without adding headcount.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation workflows across a matrixed org, leading demos and enablement sessions that activated 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and influencing prioritization of intent-based YAML generation as a strategic launch deliverable.

Improved data integrity and retrieval across the platform by defining metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting average lookup time by 83% for engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Secured **cross-functional alignment** across 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating **$3M** in accelerated revenue for Azure's commercial org.

Defined the product strategy to reduce launch toil, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact critical paths.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize investments, and make data-driven trade-offs across competing program workstreams.
amazon_robotics: Delivered **zero operational downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by owning the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and managing readiness across Operations and Engineering.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives — resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and driving closed-loop process improvements that stabilized the developer intake workflow.

Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, managing cross-functional dependencies and accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% ahead of program milestones.

Tracked and communicated emerging risks and timeline shifts to program leadership, maintaining a live dependency map and ensuring all workstreams stayed coordinated through a **complex, multi-team rollout**.
pro_painters: Owned the end-to-end **launch operations** for 200+ monthly proposals, managing scoping, invoicing, and CRM workflows to increase job bookings by 26% and improve the customer experience across the full buy flow.

Executed a digital-first **go-to-market strategy** — optimizing the website and Google presence — reducing Customer Acquisition Cost by 13% and lifting conversion rates by 2.7% through data-driven channel prioritization.

Conducted financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and delivering data-driven pricing insights that improved leadership's commercial decision-making and program-level trade-offs.

skills_priority: Program Management (Plan of Record, Launch Readiness, Lifecycle Ownership)
